components_hub_intro: Choose a section to manage your catalog, plants, or locations.
landing_heroTagline: Plan spaces, track plants, and keep the whole catalog in sync.
landing_description: A calm workspace for species, cultivars, and varieties—plus plants tied to real locations, spatial layouts, and a simple event log. Built for everyday gardening notes without spreadsheet chaos.
landing_feature_catalog: Curate species, categories, and cultivars in one structured catalog.
landing_feature_plants: Record plants with cultivar context and find them fast when you need them.
landing_feature_locations: Map greenhouses, beds, and shelves—with optional layout editing on a grid.
landing_feature_events: Log care and visits so history stays next to the plants it belongs to.
landing_previewHint: Sign in to open these sections in the app.
landing_previewHintSignedIn: Open any section below in the app.
